description_long: This is a quaint, brick-walled cabin with a steeply pitched, thatched roof and a central brick chimney. The front facade features two shuttered windows with flower boxes and a single, paneled door, all framed by the overhanging roof. The roof is thick and textured, with visible ridges and a natural straw appearance, extending well beyond the walls to provide deep eaves. The side and rear views reveal small, symmetrically placed windows, and the brickwork is consistent throughout the structure. The door is accented with a geometric pattern and is flanked by stone pavers leading up to it. The overall design evokes a traditional, rustic countryside aesthetic, suitable for a residential neighborhood or park setting.
description: A rustic brick cabin with a steep, thatched roof, central chimney, and shuttered windows. The front features a paneled door and flower boxes, giving it a cozy, countryside charm.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a paneled door, two shuttered windows with flower boxes, and stone pavers leading up to the door.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the expansive thatched roof and a single small window centered on the brick wall.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a single small window and the full width of the thatched roof, with no visible doors or additional features.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with a single small window and the thick, overhanging thatched roof.
attribute_roof_type: steeply pitched thatched roof with deep overhangs and a central brick chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Four windows in total: two medium-sized, rectangular, shuttered windows symmetrically placed on the front facade, and one small rectangular window centered on each side wall; all windows are single and evenly spaced.
attribute_door_placement: A single exterior door is centered on the front facade, directly beneath the roof's peak and flanked by two windows.
